channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Prompt Caching With the Claude API: A Practical Guide
item.description: I noticed a pattern looking at three months of Anthropic invoices. The same 8 KB system prompt was getting billed full price on every request. Same instructions, same tool definitions, same RAG...

item.title: Stop the Traffic Jam: Handling Blocking Calls in Spring Boot WebFlux
item.description: Learn how to handle blocking calls in a non-blocking Spring Boot app using Project Reactor. Master the publishOn and subscribeOn operators with Java 21 examples. Stop the Traffic Jam: Handling...

item.title: 7 Tools, 1 Question. Most Failed in Ways I Didn't Expect.
item.description: I uploaded a portrait. I expected a sharper image. What I got was a 720p export with no warning, no error, and no explanation. That's when I started actually benchmarking. The Framing Question...

item.title: Why One Model Fails
item.description: What Real AI Systems Actually Look Like) There’s a common pattern in early AI projects. You pick one model — usually the “best” one — wire it into your backend, ship a feature, and call it a day....

item.title: Flutter GoRouter Complete Guide — Full Control Over Navigation 2.0
item.description: Flutter GoRouter Complete Guide — Full Control Over Navigation 2.0 GoRouter is Flutter's officially recommended routing package. URL-based navigation, deep links, auth guards, and nested routes —...

item.title: Stop Saying “We’re Working on It” — Show Your Product Roadmap Instead
item.description: “We’re working on it.” If you’ve built any product—especially as a small team or solo developer—you’ve probably typed that sentence more times than you can count. It shows up in emails, support...

item.title: Flutter Web Rendering Complete Guide — CanvasKit vs HTML Renderer
item.description: Flutter Web Rendering Complete Guide — CanvasKit vs HTML Renderer Flutter Web supports two renderers. Understanding CanvasKit vs HTML renderer helps you pick the right one for your app. Two...

item.title: How to Turn Filament v5's Rich Editor Into a Full Block Editor
item.description: Filament v5's RichEditor is powerful out of the box. It is built on Tiptap, which means it's natively extensible, and it now supports *custom blocks out of the box . Here's how to extend it into a...

item.title: A jornada natural de um webapp:
item.description: A jornada natural de um webapp: Fase 1 — Início VPS simples, LEMP ou Docker (0–50k usuários/mês) R$26–70/mês Fase 2 — Crescimento VPS maior + Docker Compose (50k–300k usuários/mês) R$50–150/mês...

item.title: Stop Backspacing Like a Typist: My "Surgical" Syntax Deletion Tool for Emacs
item.description: I’ve always believed that a hardcore developer shouldn't waste a single second on low-level chores like "deleting code." In Emacs, most people delete code by either mashing the Backspace key like...

item.title: At his OpenAI trial, Musk relitigates an old friendship
item.description: It's a story Musk has told before -- in interviews and to author Walter Isaacson for his bestselling biography of Musk -- but Tuesday was the first time he said it under oath.

item.title: OpenAI Really Wants Codex to Shut Up About Goblins
item.description: “Never talk about goblins, gremlins, raccoons, trolls, ogres, pigeons, or other animals or creatures unless it is absolutely and unambiguously relevant,” reads OpenAI’s coding agent instructions.

item.title: It’s primetime for conspiracy theorist video creators
item.description: In the days since this year's White House Correspondents' Dinner was cut short when shots were fired at the event, there has been a boom of conspiracy theory videos created by people who insist...

item.title: Elon Musk appeared more petty than prepared
item.description: Today the first witness was sworn in in Musk v. Altman: Elon Musk. I was surprised by how flat he seemed. This is not the first time I've seen Musk in court. During his defamation suit, he turned...

item.title: James Comey indicted over Instagram seashell photo that allegedly threatened Trump
item.description: The US Department of Justice has once again indicted James Comey - this time, for an alleged threat the former FBI director made toward President Donald Trump on Instagram, as reported earlier by...

item.title: Elon Musk Testifies That He Started OpenAI to Prevent a ‘Terminator Outcome’
item.description: The judge also warned Musk and Sam Altman to curb their “propensity to use social media to make things worse outside the courtroom” after both sides traded attacks online.

item.title: Elon Musk tells the jury that all he wants to do is save humanity
item.description: On the stand, Elon Musk is positioning himself as a savior. In the high-profile trial between him and his fellow OpenAI co-founder, now CEO, Sam Altman, Musk opened by going through his...

item.title: Taylor Swift is stepping up the legal war on AI copycats
item.description: Taylor Swift has been at the center of AI imitation controversies for years, and now, she's become the latest celebrity who's escalating attempts to protect herself from AI copycats. As usual,...

item.title: Amazon is already offering new OpenAI products on AWS
item.description: A day after OpenAI got Microsoft to agree to end exclusive rights, AWS announced a slate of OpenAI model offerings, including a new agent service.

item.title: Now YouTube TV lets you multiview any channel you want
item.description: YouTube CEO Neal Mohan announced Tuesday that YouTube TV is getting "fully customizable" multiview. Users have "full control to mix and match live streams" and can "build the personalized viewing...

item.title: The FCC is going after the broadcast licenses of Disney-owned ABC stations
item.description: The Federal Communications Commission has ordered the ABC stations owned and operated by Disney to file for an early license renewal, as reported earlier by The New York Times. In a filing on...

item.title: Live updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI
item.description: Sam Altman and Elon Musk are facing off in a high-stakes trial that could alter the future of OpenAI and its most well-known product, ChatGPT. In 2024, Musk filed a lawsuit accusing OpenAI of...

item.title: Elon Musk takes the stand in high-profile trial against OpenAI
item.description: Elon Musk officially began his testimony in the trial he has brought against OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and company president Greg Brockman. The three were on the initial founding team of OpenAI, with...

item.title: Amazon launches an AI-powered audio Q&A experience on product pages
item.description: Amazon's new "Join the chat" feature lets you ask questions about products and receive AI-powered audio responses.

item.title: You can get dragged into a police investigation by proximity alone — for now
item.description: A years-old bank heist may soon have major privacy implications for every American who owns a cellphone. On Monday, the Supreme Court heard arguments in Chatrie v. United States, a case involving...

item.title: ‘It’s Undignified’: Hundreds of Workers Training Meta’s AI Could Be Laid Off
item.description: More than 700 people working for a Meta contractor in Ireland are at risk of losing their jobs, documents show.

item.title: Researchers Discover Critical GitHub CVE-2026-3854 RCE Flaw Exploitable via Single Git Push
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a critical security vulnerability impacting GitHub.com and GitHub Enterprise Server that could allow an authenticated user to obtain remote code...

item.title: Google expands Pentagon’s access to its AI after Anthropic’s refusal
item.description: After Anthropic refused to allow the DoD to use its AI for domestic mass surveillance and autonomous weapons, Google has signed a new contract with the department.

item.title: Brazilian LofyGang Resurfaces After Three Years With Minecraft LofyStealer Campaign
item.description: A cybercrime group of Brazilian origin has resurfaced after more than three years to orchestrate a campaign that targets Minecraft players with a new stealer called LofyStealer (aka GrabBot). "The...

item.title: Lovable launches its vibe-coding app on iOS and Android
item.description: The app allows developers to vibe code web apps and websites on the go.
